pip_2026-07-17.mp4.title: Pip Creates a REAL Emoji! 😂
pip_2026-07-17.mp4.description:
Experiment Log #1707: It's World Emoji Day! I had a perfectly round, perfectly yellow, perfectly SQUISHY idea! 😂 What happens when it meets the Mystical Press? The result made me giggle so hard! ✨ What's your favorite emoji for me to try next? Let me know in the comments below! 👇 Pip-pip!

#PipsProjects #WorldEmojiDay #Emoji #Satisfying #ASMR #CuteAnimation #Claymation #HydraulicPress
